deployments.summary: Fixed dashboard timeout for workspaces with 200+ projects. Resolved mobile Safari assignee dropdown reset. Emergency patch triggered by BUG-2041.
Shipped custom fields v2 (text, number, date types). Refactored CSV export pipeline. Added project template library.

incidents.title: Dashboard 504 timeout — 12 enterprise accounts
incidents.root_cause: Missing query limit in dashboard projects endpoint introduced in v2.4.1
